headlines.title: DOJ charges 15 people it says impeded agents during Minnesota immigration crackdown
headlines.description: The protesters face charges that include conspiracy to impede or injure federal officers, assault on a federal officer and destruction of government property, federal officials said.

headlines.title: Trump tests and looming battleground races highlight Tuesday’s primaries
headlines.description: President Donald Trump’s endorsement will once again be put to the test in multiple Republican primaries Tuesday, which will also mark the kickoff of major general election campaigns for Senate and governor in battleground Georgia

headlines.title: MLB warns players not to deface uniforms in wake of silent Pride Night protest
headlines.description: The edict came after several San Francisco Giants players openly defied the team’s Pride Night.

headlines.title: FBI foils plot to attack White House during UFC event
headlines.description: Federal law enforcement said they foiled a plan to attack the White House during the UFC event on Sunday. Five suspects have been arrested and there’s a manhunt for others. NBC News’ Kelly O’Donnell reports.

headlines.title: ‘A shame’ to hear Jeffries speak out against impeaching Trump as top priority: N.Y. House candidate
headlines.description: Early voting is underway in New York’s deep blue 12th congressional district. Candidate Laura Dunn (D) joins Meet the Press NOW to discuss her bid to fill the seat of retiring Rep. Jerry Nadler (D-N.Y.).

headlines.title: Kornacki: Voters in Georgia and Alabama set to weigh in on Trump-backed candidates
headlines.description: President Trump’s endorsement power is once again being put to the test in multiple Republican primaries. NBC News Chief Data Analyst Steve Kornacki outlines Tuesday’s key runoffs in Alabama and Georgia and the primary race in Washington, DC. NBC News Correspondent Priscilla Thompson talks to voters in Georgia.

headlines.title: U.S. deportation tracker: Counting arrests, detentions and border crossings
headlines.description: President Donald Trump came into office promising the largest mass deportation in U.S history, targeting the more than 10 million unauthorized migrants living in the United States.

headlines.title: State Assemblyman Alex Bores speaks on AI and politics
headlines.description: State Assemblyman Alex Bores, a candidate for New York's 12th Congressional District, speaks with NBC News’ Gadi Schwartz about why some top artificial intelligence companies are opposing his candidacy and whether AI should play a role in politics.

headlines.title: FBI foiled plot to attack White House UFC event, Kash Patel says
headlines.description: The FBI foiled a plot to attack Sunday’s UFC fight at the White House, Director Kash Patel said on X.

headlines.title: Trump wanted the Reflecting Pool to be ‘American flag blue.’ Algae are turning it green.
headlines.description: The contractor that handled the lining told NBC News it was first priced at $13.1 million, but increased to $14.6 million because “the park service added work to the original scope.”

headlines.title: Judge rules transgender people won’t face criminal charges for using Idaho public restrooms
headlines.description: A judge ruled Tuesday that transgender people won’t face criminal charges for using Idaho public restrooms that match their gender identities

headlines.title: The places to watch in Alabama and Georgia tonight: From the Politics Desk
headlines.description: Ahead of tonight’s primary runoffs in Alabama and Georgia, Steve Kornacki spotlights the key areas that could swing the outcomes.
